articles.title: Queue these up: What to watch on Netflix and more in March
articles.description:
From Netflix arrivals like “The Lego Movie” and “Misery” to Oscar nominees, here’s what to watch this month.

The post Queue these up: What to watch on Netflix and more in March appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Watch 'The Lego Movie' and 'Misery' on Netflix this March in Boston.
Oscar nominees available for streaming include several films recognized in 2023.
Local residents can enjoy new entertainment options during the spring season.

articles.title: FAA briefly grounds all JetBlue flights after a request from the airline
articles.description:
The ground stop was lifted about 40 minutes after it was imposed.

The post FAA briefly grounds all JetBlue flights after a request from the airline appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: FAA grounded all JetBlue flights for 40 minutes on March 10, 2023.
JetBlue requested the ground stop, affecting numerous Boston travelers.
Passengers experienced delays, impacting travel plans during peak hours.

articles.title: Why he’s running the Boston Marathon in memory of family treated at Dana-Farber
articles.description:
"My guiding light is my dad."

The post Why he’s running the Boston Marathon in memory of family treated at Dana-Farber appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Trevor Murray runs the Boston Marathon to honor family members treated at Dana-Farber.
Murray's father was a significant influence, motivating his participation in the race.
The event raises awareness and support for cancer treatment in the Boston community.
